home.headline:
The International Academic
Intelligence Platform.
home.subheadline: Transparent grade conversion, GPA calculation, and in-depth education system guides for international students, admissions offices, and academic institutions worldwide.
home.highlightDesc: Each country's education system has unique grading conventions, degree structures, and recognition frameworks. Select a country to read its full education guide.
home.platformTitle: Everything You Need for International Academic Navigation.
home.platformDesc: Built for students, administrators, and institutions who need reliable, explainable grade equivalency.
feat.bavarianDesc: Official DAAD-approved formula for all conversions to Germany, with complete step-by-step derivation shown.
feat.verdictDesc: Every conversion shows pass/fail status, performance classification, and contextual interpretation based on destination country rules.
feat.bidirDesc: All 31 countries are both source and destination. Any-to-any conversion pair is supported.
feat.guidesDesc: Long-form country guides covering degree structure, grading scales, GPA methods, and international recognition.
feat.gpaDesc: Weighted GPA computation across 4.0, 4.3, 4.5, and 5.0 scales. Includes cumulative GPA tracking.
feat.multilangDesc: Available in 8 languages. Switch from the header to access the platform in your preferred language.
tool.label: Tools / Grade Converter
tool.title: International Grade Converter
tool.desc: Select source and destination countries, enter your grade, and receive a fully transparent conversion with formula breakdown.
tool.disclaimerText: This conversion is provided for informational purposes only. Final grade recognition, equivalency, and admission decisions rest solely with the receiving institution. GradeScope does not represent any official academic body. Results should be verified with your target institution.
tool.passMsg: Meets the minimum pass threshold of {pass} on the {scale} scale.
tool.failMsg: Does not meet the minimum pass threshold of {pass} on the {scale} scale.
gpa.label: Tools / GPA Calculator
gpa.title: GPA Calculator
gpa.desc: Calculate your GPA across multiple grading scales — 4.0, 4.3, 4.5, or 5.0. Add your courses, assign grades and credits, and get a full weighted breakdown instantly.
gpa.cumulativeDesc: Enter your existing GPA and credit hours to calculate your new cumulative GPA including these courses.
gpa.emptyState: Add your courses and click Calculate GPA to see your result.
gpa.formulaNote: Quality points per course = Grade Points × Credits
st.label: Tools / Study Tool
st.title: Spaced Repetition Study Tool
st.desc: SM-2 algorithm schedules reviews at the exact right moment — study less, remember more.
st.frontPlaceholder: e.g. What does GPA stand for?
st.bulkPlaceholder:
Photosynthesis :: Plants convert sunlight to glucose
Mitosis :: Cell division producing 2 identical cells
st.algoDesc: Rate each card after flipping. Easy cards are reviewed less often; hard cards return sooner. 21+ days = Mastered.
st.noCardsYet: No cards yet — add your first card to begin.
st.resetConfirm: Reset all SM-2 progress? Card content stays intact.
st.howWell: How well did you recall this?
footer.disclaimer: For informational purposes only · Final recognition determined by receiving institution
blog.title: Blog & Articles
blog.desc: Practical articles on international education, grade conversion, and academic mobility.
guides.title: Country Educational Guides
guides.desc: In-depth guides to grading systems, degree structures, and academic culture across 31 countries.
about.headline: Built for Students Who Cross Borders.
about.sub: GradeScope is a free international academic intelligence platform designed to make grade conversion, GPA calculation, and education system understanding accessible to every student, institution, and admissions office in the world.
about.mission.title: Our Mission
about.mission.desc: To eliminate confusion in international academic transitions by providing transparent, formula-driven grade conversions — not black-box guesses. Every result comes with a full explanation of the method used.
about.global.title: Global Coverage
about.global.desc: We support 31 countries and 961 conversion pairs. Whether you're converting a US GPA to a German note, a UK classification to a French mention, or a Nigerian CGPA — we've got you covered.
about.diff.title: What Makes Us Different
about.diff.transparent.title: Formula Transparent
about.diff.transparent.desc: Every conversion shows the exact formula — Modified Bavarian, linear interpolation, or classification-based — so you always know how your grade was calculated.
about.diff.verdict.title: Pass/Fail Verdict
about.diff.verdict.desc: We apply each destination country's actual passing threshold — not just a number, but a real academic verdict that matters for admissions and enrollment.
about.diff.free.title: Fully Free
about.diff.free.desc: GradeScope is completely free to use. No subscriptions, no paywalls. We believe academic tools should be accessible to every student worldwide.
about.diff.lang.title: Multi-Language
about.diff.lang.desc: Available in 8 languages including Arabic (RTL), Chinese, German, French, Spanish, Portuguese, and Turkish.
about.quote: "Grades should be a bridge, not a barrier. GradeScope exists to make sure your academic achievements are understood — wherever in the world you choose to go."
contact.headline: We'd Love to Hear From You.
contact.sub: Have a question, suggestion, or just want to say hi? Reach us directly on Instagram — we read every message.
contact.card1.title: Questions
contact.card1.desc: Ask us anything about grade conversion or GPA calculations.
contact.card2.title: Suggestions
contact.card2.desc: Want a new country or feature? We want to know.
contact.card3.title: Partnerships
contact.card3.desc: Schools, universities, and institutions are welcome to reach out.
fc.label: Tools / Flashcard Study Tool
fc.title: Flashcard Study Tool
fc.desc: Paste your study notes or upload a text file — the tool automatically converts your content into interactive flip flashcards. No AI. Your content, structured your way.
fc.emptyState: Paste your notes and click Generate Flashcards to start studying. Your content is parsed locally — nothing leaves your browser.
fc.hint: Click card or press Space to flip · ← → arrow keys to navigate
